The '''skirmish on Spindrift''' was a brief battle that was part of [[Operation Earplug]].<ref name="Wizards" />

It was aimed at destroying the defenses of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Empire's]] [[Spindrift Station]] and retrieving route coordinates for a [[Secret armada|massive Imperial fleet]] that were kept in the outpost.<ref name="Star Wars 60" />

Spindrift Station was caught completely unprepared, having merely been trained to repel attacks by [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] ships. Four Rebel-controlled [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE/LN starfighters]] were let in through the base's defenses and proceeded with razing the entire facility, from their communications hub to their main defense battery. Believing the attack to be an Imperial reprisal from [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]] for regulation violations, the Imperial [[Major/Legends|major]] in command of the outpost quickly offered his surrender.<ref name="Star Wars 60" />

As devastating as the attack was, the base personnel suffered few casualties and all remaining staff were taken aboard a troop transport as POWs.<ref name="Star Wars 60" />

A coded cartograph module containing the wanted coordinates was retrieved from the ruins and with the mission successfully accomplished, the Rebels left Spindrift Station to burn to the ground.<ref name="Star Wars 60" />
